# Roadmap Issues

Use these as starter GitHub issues for the next round of product polish.

Product direction: **NBA Legacy Lab**, an R/Shiny app for exploring historical NBA player value, comparing eras, and predicting All-Star-level production.

## [#3 Add true app demo GIF](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/3)

Record the Shiny app workflow from landing view to Visual Stories and All-Star Predictor, then replace `outputs/demo.gif` with an animated walkthrough.

## [#4 Add data dictionary](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/4)

Document the core player, team, All-Star, and Hall of Fame fields used by the app and modeling scripts.

## [#5 Improve All-Star model calibration](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/5)

Address the logistic regression separation warning, add probability calibration, and compare model performance across eras.

## [#6 Add similar player detail table](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/6)

Show the nearest similar player seasons in the Shiny app alongside the Similar Player Map.

## [#7 Polish screenshot gallery](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/7)

Promote the strongest exported charts into a polished screenshot gallery after final visual styling.

## [#8 Deploy Shiny app](https://github.com/TallData/NBA-Stats/issues/8)

Publish the app to shinyapps.io, Posit Connect, or another public host and add the live demo link to the README.
